title: ayenia campicola
intro: Ayenia campicola is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Apocynaceae family, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. The plant is native to tropical regions and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ayenia campicola include its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, digestive problems, and skin conditions. The plant's medicinal properties can be utilized through various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and topical applications.
